presentation.title: Program Coach Deck 02 — Blueprint & FEC Integration Workshop
presentation.subtitle: Complete Blueprint · Revenue Model · FEC Integration

slides.title: Open the Blueprint
slides.body:
VISION
↓
BUSINESS MODEL  ← today's focus
↓
REVENUE MODEL  ← today's focus
↓
GROWTH STRATEGY
slides.speakerNotes:
ACT IV — Scene 10. Open Venture Blueprint in the Playbook.
Do not explain all ten sections — show only this stack.
Highlight Business Model and Revenue Model.
Message: I already have a venture. Today I make the business model and revenue model real.
discussionQuestions: How does your Business Model change when you integrate with the platform?

slides.title: Open the FEC — Week 3 → Week 4
slides.body:
Week 3
Customers · Problems · Solutions · Value Proposition
↓
Week 4
Platform · Revenue Engine · Agency Growth
slides.speakerNotes:
ACT IV — Scene 11. This is the real transformation.
Week 3 FEC = customer and venture discovery.
Week 4 FEC = platform integration and scalable revenue.
Open FEC in Playbook — extend, do not erase Week 3 boxes.
discussionQuestions: Which Week 3 FEC box connects most directly to Platform?

slides.title: Workshop Instructions
slides.body:
Complete today:

✓ Venture Blueprint — Business Model & Revenue Model
✓ FEC — Platform, Revenue Engine, Agency Growth
✓ Portfolio sync — platform integration narrative
slides.speakerNotes:
ACT IV — Scene 12. Workshop block — allow 90+ minutes with mentor circulation.
Checklist on screen while they work.
Close: They should leave thinking — I already have a venture. Today I integrated it with a proven platform so it can become a real business.
Preview Day 17.
discussionQuestions: What changed in your venture story after platform integration?
